# ez gentoo

ez gentoo is a Windows app for installing and launching a ready-to-use Gentoo Linux desktop inside a Hyper-V virtual machine.

It is for beginners, Linux-curious users, and people who want to play with Gentoo without doing the full manual install first.

Useful descriptions:

- one-click Gentoo VM installer for Windows
- easy Gentoo Hyper-V launcher
- Gentoo desktop VM with XFCE and VNC
- beginner-friendly Gentoo Linux playground
- Gentoo for larpers

The app is native C++ and uses Windows Hyper-V plus TigerVNC. It can configure VM name, install folder, RAM, CPU cores, disk size, image URL/file, start the VM, find the VM IP, and open the desktop.

Repository: https://github.com/Pocimin/ez-gentoo
